title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Netafim India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Netafim India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Netafim India in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Netafim India:
Netafim India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netafim India!
